channel.title: HackRTU — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by HackRTU (hackrtu).

item.title: CVE-2025-13651 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — LEAK OF SENSITIVE INFORMATION ON MICROCOM'S ZEUSWEB
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Microcom ZeusWeb allows Web Application Fingerprinting of sensitive data. This issue affects ZeusWeb: 6.1.31.

item.title: CVE-2025-13650 · 5.1 MEDIUM — REFLECTED CROSS-SITE SCRIPTING (XSS) ON MICROCOM'S ZEUSWEB
item.description: An attacker with access to the web application ZeusWeb of the provider Microcom (in this case, registration is not necessary, but the action must be performed) who has the vulnerable software could introduce arbitrary JavaScript by injecting an XSS p…

item.title: CVE-2025-13649 · 5.1 MEDIUM — REFLECTED CROSS-SITE SCRIPTING (XSS) ON MICROCOM'S ZEUSWEB
item.description: An attacker with access to the web application ZeusWeb of the provider Microcom (in this case, registration is not necessary, but the action must be performed) who has the vulnerable software could introduce arbitrary JavaScript by injecting an XSS p…

item.title: CVE-2025-13648 · 4.8 MEDIUM — STORED CROSS-SITE SCRIPTING (XSS) ON MICROCOM'S ZEUSWEB
item.description: An attacker with access to the web application ZeusWeb of the provider Microcom (in this case, registration is required) who has the vulnerable software could introduce arbitrary JavaScript by injecting an XSS payload into the ‘Name’ and “Surname” pa…
